plan_binding_snapshot.title: CP00-614 RP20.P02.M03.S01-RP20.P02.M04.S18 generated_from_weighted_implementation_ledger
plan_binding_snapshot.renumbering_policy: Pack IDs are monotonic after the latest live closeout pack. If a requested locked queue skips live-open ledger units, live-open units are inserted first and requested packs are shifted with correction_reason.

implementation_summary.summary: CP00-614 covers the RP20 Data Room And VDR P02 primary implementation service descriptor and pre-test secondary workflow service rows over 40 planned units, preserving no-write, no-real-data, service, permission, audit, primary/secondary workflow, failure recovery, tenant/matter, and handoff boundaries without opening Data Room or VDR runtime behavior.

parsed_review.summary: CP00-614 is a descriptor-only RP20 Data Room/VDR P02 primary+secondary service pack (40 units, 2 micro-sections: M03 Primary Implementation Slice = 22 rows, M04 Secondary Workflow Slice = 18 rows). The implementation in packages/data-room (registry.js, service.js, validators.js) builds frozen, synthetic-only descriptors that hardcode every no-write / no-real-data / no-runtime boundary to false (freezeCp614Result, service.js:267-322), and validateDataRoomVdrCoreCp614P02PrimarySecondaryServiceDescriptor re-asserts those boundaries plus coverage. Coverage (40 units, 2 sections) and the deliverable distribution (contract 2, implementation 18, security_audit 4, ui 6, claude_review 2, failure_recovery 4, test 4) match the baseline, manifest, registry constants, and the data-room-vdr-core-contract.json cp614 projections — which model.test.js asserts via deepEqual. Authority boundary is preserved: Claude is read-only and not final approver (claude_is_final_approval: false), human approval is required to open runtime, and Hermes appears only as descriptor evidence packets/receipts (emits_hermes_runtime_receipt: false), never as embedded product runtime. The pack does not overclaim: manifest, command-evidence, and construction-inspection all keep production_ready=false and runtime_ready=false (implementation_layer: descriptor). Review-hardening preconditions are satisfied: readiness auth preflight returned exit 0 with well-formed non-zero JSON, source inspection used read tools only, and no forbidden tools were present. The pending state of adjudication, construction-inspection, and command-evidence is the designed pre-review sequence and is not a defect. One non-blocking P3 observation: the CP614 validator and CP614 test omit the executes_integration_smoke_runtime assertion that CP613 carries, even though CP614 M03 includes the "Integration smoke case" row — but the field is hardcoded false and the result object is frozen, so there is no runtime exposure. No P0, P1, or P2 issues; the pack is safe to proceed to post-review adjudication and final closeout validation.

findings.title: CP00-614 descriptor validator and test omit the integration-smoke runtime assertion present in CP00-613
findings.details: executes_integration_smoke_runtime is hardcoded false in freezeCp614Result (packages/data-room/src/service.js:306) and the result object is frozen, and the CP614 M03 section (P02_SERVICE_REVIEW_ROWS) includes the 'Integration smoke case' row. However, validateDataRoomVdrCoreCp614P02PrimarySecondaryServiceDescriptor (validators.js:592-632) asserts executes_primary_implementation_runtime, executes_secondary_workflow_runtime, and executes_failure_recovery_runtime are false but, unlike validateDataRoomVdrCoreCp613... (validators.js:485) and the CP613 test (test/model.test.js:243), does not re-assert executes_integration_smoke_runtime === false; the CP614 test (test/model.test.js:272-295) likewise omits it. No boundary is actually violated because the field is frozen false; the gap is limited to validator/test defense-in-depth parity with CP613.
findings.recommendation: For parity with CP00-613, add assertCondition(descriptor.executes_integration_smoke_runtime === false, "descriptor must not execute integration smoke runtime") to the CP614 validator and a matching assert.equal(descriptor.executes_integration_smoke_runtime, false) in the CP00-614 'keeps primary and secondary service rows descriptor-only' test.
findings.post_review_disposition: Non-blocking. The attestation field is hardcoded false on a frozen object, so there is no runtime exposure or boundary violation; treat as optional hardening for validator/test consistency. Does not block CP00-614 closeout, pack closeout, or goal closeout.

commit_policy.message: Close CP00-614 data room vdr core p02 primary secondary service descriptor pack
